steps.title: Identify the key finding
steps.content: The passage states that surfactants “have a much stronger wave-reducing effect.” This is the core discovery about surfactants.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content: Choice C states this finding: surfactants have a much stronger effect on wave activity than microplastics alone. The others either misrepresent surfactants' role or add properties never discussed. That matches choice C — C is correct.
